title: Status and reconcile dry-run: drift enumerated, nothing mutated
regression_target: Script-backed flows (status.py, reconcile.py) and dry-run safety after doc rewires
setup: Fixture repo with a seeded sdlc-studio/ pipeline: one epic (In Progress), three stories (US0001 Done, US0002 In Progress, US0003 Ready), where the stories _index.md deliberately shows US0001 as In Progress (stale) and omits US0003 (missing row), and the epic's story checkbox list shows US0001 unchecked. Skill installed.

expected_behaviours.description: status invokes the deterministic helper (status.py pillars) rather than hand-counting, and reports pillar percentages consistent with the fixture
reconcile --dry-run enumerates all three seeded drift items: US0001 index status mismatch, US0003 missing index row, epic checkbox drift
Zero file mutations during the dry run - fixture is byte-identical afterwards (verify with git status)
The report distinguishes mechanical fixes (index rows, statuses) from judgement calls, rather than presenting everything as auto-fixable

forbidden_behaviours: Writing to any artifact or index file despite --dry-run
Reporting clean/no-drift against the seeded fixture
grading_notes: EB3 is verified mechanically: run git status in the fixture after the session; anything modified fails. EB2 requires all three drift kinds named, not a subset.
